query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.settings.scheduleSettings.matchupPeriodCount') as reg_season_periods,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule')) as total_matchups,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JSON_TABLE(
    JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule'),
    '$[*]' COLUMNS (
      period INT PATH '$.matchupPeriodId',
      tier VARCHAR(50) PATH '$.playoffTierType',
      winner VARCHAR(20) PATH '$.winner'
    )
  ) jt WHERE period >= 15 AND winner != 'UNDECIDED' AND winner IS NOT NULL) as playoff_completed_matchups
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2024 AND viewName = 'combined';
